datasets.title: AudioVideoProcessed
datasets.description: In the Audio Video Processed Brightspace Data Set, each row represents one completed media processing job. The data set captures events from January 2022 onwards.
dataDescription: One row per completed media processing job.
Captures events from January 2022 onwards.
Activity/object identifiers for related media assets.
Audit-style timestamps for processing and updates.

fields.name: content_id
fields.description: Unique content identifier.

fields.name: revision_id
fields.description: Unique revision identifier.

fields.name: revision_number
fields.description: Indicates the version of the media object that this processing job applies to.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of content for this revision: Audio or Video.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Location in Brightspace from which the content was added. Field can be null.

fields.name: revision_size
fields.description: Size of all resources for this revision in bytes.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration of the revision in seconds.

fields.name: required_transcoding
fields.description: True if the revision required transcoding.

fields.name: required_transcribing
fields.description: True if the revision required transcribing.

fields.name: last_modified
fields.description: Date this revision was last modified (UTC).

datasets.title: ContentObjects
datasets.description: The Content Objects Brightspace Data Set returns information about content topics and modules created for your org units.
dataDescription: Content object identifiers and parent-child relationships.
Org unit references and object typing.
Visibility, availability, and content metadata fields.
Deidentified for open data release with direct user identifiers removed.

fields.name: content_object_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the content.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique org unit identifier.

fields.name: content_object_type
fields.description: Content object type.

fields.name: completion_type
fields.description: Content completion type.

fields.name: parent_content_object_id
fields.description: Parent content object identifier.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Content availability start date (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: Content availability end date (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: Content availability due date (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: object_id_1
fields.description: Quick link Object ID for the associated tool. Maps to dropbox_id, quiz_id, checklist_id, survey_id, chat_id, self_assessment_id. For Discussions, this field is used if a forum is quicklinked. Field can be null.

fields.name: object_id_2
fields.description: Quick link Object ID, only used for the Discussion tool if a Topic is quicklinked. Field can be null.

fields.name: object_id_3
fields.description: Quick link Object ID, only used for the Discussion tool if a Thread is quicklinked. Field can be null.

fields.name: last_modified
fields.description: Date the content was last modified (UTC).

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Content is deleted.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Display sort order used for the content objects.

fields.name: depth
fields.description: Indicates the number of nested hierarchical levels in the discussion post.

fields.name: tool_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the tool. Field can be null.

fields.name: is_hidden
fields.description: Content object has not been published yet.

fields.name: result_id
fields.description: Release Condition unique result identifier. Field can be null.

fields.name: deleted_date
fields.description: Date when the content object was deleted (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: ai_utilization
fields.description: Indicates whether D2L Lumi (Brightspace AI) capabilities were used and the level of AI involvement: 0 No AI; 1 Generated by AI and reviewed by a human; 2 Generated by AI and edited by a human; 3 Assisted or uplifted by AI; 4 Generated by AI but not yet reviewed by a human.

droppedFields.name: created_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the content creator.

droppedFields.name: last_modified_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the last person who modified content.

droppedFields.name: deleted_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the person who deleted content.

droppedFields.name: title
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text content titles can contain personal identifiers.

droppedFields.name: location
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text content locations can contain personal identifiers.

datasets.title: DiscussionsForum
datasets.description: The Discussion Forums Brightspace Data Set returns discussion forums. Results are ordered from newest to oldest.
dataDescription: Forum/topic/post identifiers and hierarchy links.
Author and org unit references.
Creation/update metadata and status indicators.
Deidentified for open data release with direct user identifiers removed.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique org unit identifier.

fields.name: forum_id
fields.description: Unique forum identifier.

fields.name: has_description
fields.description: Indicates whether the discussion forum has a non-empty description.

fields.name: must_post_to_participate
fields.description: Indicates that a user must post in the discussion forum in order to participate in any discussion threads.

fields.name: allow_anon
fields.description: Indicates whether there is anonymous posting permitted for the discussion forum.

fields.name: is_hidden
fields.description: Indicates whether the discussion forum is hidden.

fields.name: requires_approval
fields.description: Indicates that the discussion forum requires approval from a moderator before contributions to the forum are posted.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Display sort order used for the content objects.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Indicates if the discussion forum is deleted. Field can be null.

fields.name: deleted_date
fields.description: Date when the discussion forum was deleted (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: result_id
fields.description: Unique release condition result identifier. Field can be null.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: First date when learners can post to topics in the forum (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: start_date_availability_type
fields.description: Before the start_date, this type determines whether learners can view or access discussion topics within the forum. Field can be null.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: Last date when learners can post to topics in the forum (UTC).

fields.name: end_date_availability_type
fields.description: After the end_date, this type determines whether learners can view or access discussion topics within the forum. Field can be null.

droppedFields.name: deleted_by_user_id
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the person who deleted the forum.

droppedFields.name: name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text forum names can contain personal identifiers.

droppedFields.name: description
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text forum descriptions can contain personal identifiers.

datasets.title: GradeObjects
datasets.description: The Grade Objects Brightspace Data Set returns a list of the grade objects created for your org units. The data set returns a NULL grade scheme value when the grade item is using the default scheme.
dataDescription: Grade object identifiers and org unit linkage.
Grade item names, categories, and weighting rules.
Points/score settings and grading lifecycle metadata.
Deidentified for open data release with direct user identifiers removed.

fields.name: grade_object_id
fields.description: Unique grade object identifier.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique org unit identifier.

fields.name: parent_grade_object_id
fields.description: Parent grade object identifier. Note: Categories are considered parent grade objects and can be resolved by joining on this field. Field can be null.

fields.name: type_name
fields.description: Grade object type name.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Start date for the grade object (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: End date for the grade object (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: is_auto_pointed
fields.description: Is the grade object automatically pointed.

fields.name: is_formula
fields.description: Is a formula associated with the grade object.

fields.name: is_bonus
fields.description: Is bonus grade.

fields.name: max_points
fields.description: Maximum points achievable in this grade.

fields.name: can_exceed_max_grade
fields.description: Can user get more than maximum points.

fields.name: exclude_from_final_grade_calc
fields.description: Is grade excluded from final grade calculation.

fields.name: grade_scheme_id
fields.description: Unique grade scheme identifier. Null when grade item uses the default scheme. Field can be null.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Weight associated with the grade. Field can be null.

fields.name: num_lowest_grades_to_drop
fields.description: Drop number of lowest grades from the calculated grade.

fields.name: num_highest_grades_to_drop
fields.description: Drop number of highest grades from the calculated grade.

fields.name: weight_distribution_type
fields.description: Grade weight distribution within category. Field can be null.

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Date the grade was created (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: tool_name
fields.description: Tool associated with the object. Field can be null.

fields.name: associated_tool_item_id
fields.description: Unique activity ID associated with the grade object (Dropbox ID, Quiz ID, Discussion ID). Field can be null.

fields.name: last_modified
fields.description: Last time the grade was modified (UTC).

fields.name: grade_object_type_id
fields.description: ID of the grade object type. Values: Numeric=1, Pass/Fail=2, Select box=3, Text=4, Calculated=5, Formula=6, Final Calculated=7, Final Adjusted=8, Category=9.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Specified sort order of grade objects.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Indicates if the grade object is deleted.

fields.name: deleted_date
fields.description: Date the grade object was soft deleted. Field can be null.

fields.name: result_id
fields.description: Unique release condition result identifier. Field can be null.

fields.name: tool_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the tool associated with the object. Field can be null.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Version number of this grade object.

droppedFields.name: deleted_by_user_id
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the person who deleted the grade object.

droppedFields.name: name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text grade object names can contain personal identifiers.

droppedFields.name: short_name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text short names can contain personal identifiers.

datasets.title: OrganizationalUnits
datasets.description: The Organizational Units Brightspace Data Set returns details about all org units within your organization. Note: Backfill of historical is_deleted, deleted_date, and recycled_date values is determined by the date/time values in the org_unit audit log.
dataDescription: Core org unit fields such as org_unit_id, type, name, code, and is_active.
Availability and lifecycle dates (start_date, end_date, deleted_date, recycled_date).
Hierarchy mappings including ancestor/descendant/parent relationships.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique org unit identifier.

fields.name: organization
fields.description: Organization name.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Org unit type. For example: Group, Section, Semester, Department, etc.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Availability start date (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: Availability end date (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Is the org unit active.

fields.name: created_date
fields.description: Org unit create date.

fields.name: is_deleted
fields.description: Indicates whether the org unit is deleted (soft deleted or recycled). Soft deleted means the org unit was deleted from the application but remains in the database. Recycled means it remains in recycle bin until permanent removal. Field can be null.

fields.name: deleted_date
fields.description: Date the org unit was soft deleted. Field can be null.

fields.name: recycled_date
fields.description: Date the org unit was recycled. Field can be null.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Indicates the version of the content in the row.

fields.name: org_unit_type_id
fields.description: Identifier for the org unit type.

droppedFields.name: name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because org unit names may contain personal identifiers depending on naming conventions.

droppedFields.name: code
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because org unit codes may contain personal identifiers depending on naming conventions.

datasets.title: QuizObjects
datasets.description: The Quiz Objects Brightspace Data Set returns information about the settings and properties of a quiz.
dataDescription: Quiz object configuration (name, dates, availability, time limits).
Attempt-level records including score, completion time, and due context.
Question and response-level data for evaluation and analysis.
Deidentified for open data release with direct user identifiers removed.

fields.name: quiz_id
fields.description: Unique quiz identifier.

fields.name: has_quiz_description
fields.description: Indicates whether the quiz originally had a non-empty description before deidentification.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Indicates if the quiz is active.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Org unit identifier associated with the quiz object.

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: First time the quiz is visible. Field can be null.

fields.name: end_date
fields.description: Last date the quiz is visible. Field can be null.

fields.name: due_date
fields.description: Date the quiz is due (UTC). Field can be null.

fields.name: creation_date
fields.description: Date the quiz was created (UTC).

fields.name: last_modified
fields.description: Date when the quiz was last modified (UTC).

fields.name: grade_object_id
fields.description: Grade object identifier associated with the quiz. Field can be null.

fields.name: overall_score_calculation
fields.description: Quiz score calculation method (Highest Attempt, Lowest Attempt, Average of all attempts, First Attempt, Last Attempt). Field can be null.

fields.name: quiz_score_denominator
fields.description: Denominator for the quiz score.

fields.name: has_password
fields.description: Indicates if a password is required to access this quiz. Field can be null.

fields.name: ip_restricted
fields.description: Indicates if this quiz is available only to certain IP Addresses. Field can be null.

fields.name: time_limit
fields.description: Time limit for the quiz in minutes.

fields.name: time_limit_enforced
fields.description: Indicates if the time limit assigned to the quiz is enforced.

fields.name: attempts_allowed
fields.description: Number of times learners are permitted to attempt the quiz. Null indicates unlimited attempts.

fields.name: prevent_moving_backwards
fields.description: Indicates if learners are permitted to move to previous pages in the quiz.

fields.name: allow_hints
fields.description: Indicates that there are hints allowed for the quiz.

fields.name: disable_pager_access
fields.description: Indicates that learners cannot access the pager functionality.

fields.name: display_in_calendar
fields.description: Indicates if the quiz is displayed in the Calendar. Field can be null.

fields.name: is_attempt_rldb
fields.description: Indicates if Respondus LockDown Browser is required to attempt this quiz.

fields.name: is_subview_rldb
fields.description: Indicates if Respondus LockDown Browser is required to see quiz results (submission view).

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Display sort order for quizzes (when not alphabetical).

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Unique category identifier for the quiz. Field can be null.

fields.name: result_id
fields.description: Unique release condition result identifier. Field can be null.

fields.name: is_retake_incorrect_only
fields.description: Indicates if the quiz allows Retake Incorrect Only.

fields.name: paging_type_id
fields.description: Exposes page break information. Values: NULL=Classic Quiz Creation paging, 0=All questions on one page, 1=One question per page, 2=Page breaks after each section, 3=5 questions per page, 4=10 questions per page. Field can be null.

fields.name: is_synchronous
fields.description: Indicates that a quiz is synchronous. A synchronous quiz's timer starts on the start date.

fields.name: deduction_percentage
fields.description: The percentage of a question's point value deducted from the quiz attempt score if answered incorrectly. Field can be null.

fields.name: ai_study_support
fields.description: Indicates if D2L Lumi Study Support is enabled for the quiz.

fields.name: hide_question_points
fields.description: Indicates that the quiz has Hide Question Points enabled.

droppedFields.name: notification_email
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it may contain direct contact information.

droppedFields.name: created_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the quiz creator.

droppedFields.name: last_modified_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the last person who modified the quiz.

droppedFields.name: quiz_description
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text quiz descriptions can contain personal identifiers.

droppedFields.name: quiz_name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text quiz names can contain personal identifiers.

droppedFields.name: quiz_category
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because free-text quiz categories can contain personal identifiers.

datasets.title: ReleaseConditionsObjects
datasets.description: The Release Condition Objects Brightspace Data Set returns all the release conditions (prerequisites and results) that have been created in the organization.
dataDescription: Condition object identifiers and related tool/object mappings.
Rule expression structure using All/Any operators and operands.
Join keys (for example id_1/id_2) used to connect with activity datasets.

fields.name: pre_requisite_id
fields.description: Unique pre-requisite identifier.

fields.name: result_id
fields.description: Unique result identifier.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique organization identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Pre-requisite condition name.

fields.name: is_negative_condition
fields.description: Indicates if the condition relies on something not happening.

fields.name: pre_requisite_tool_id
fields.description: Unique pre-requisite tool identifier.

fields.name: id_1
fields.description: Unique identifier for the pre-requisite tool. Field can be null.

fields.name: id_2
fields.description: Secondary unique identifier for the pre-requisite tool when needed. Field can be null.

fields.name: result_tool_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the result tool.

fields.name: uses_percentage
fields.description: Indicates if the pre-requisite is looking at a grade percentage.

fields.name: operator_type_desc
fields.description: Defines whether all or any of the pre-requisites need to be met. Field can be null.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Indicates the version of the row. Used to determine which table row occurred first, similar to timestamps in other datasets.

fields.name: guid_1
fields.description: Unique identifier for the pre-requisite tool. For Outcome-based release condition objects, this matches the ObjectId of the outcome. Field can be null.

fields.name: guid_2
fields.description: Unique identifier for the pre-requisite tool. For Outcome-based release condition objects, this matches the ScaleLevelId of the outcome. Field can be null.

datasets.title: RoleDetails
datasets.description: The Role Details Brightspace Data Set returns a full set of attributes for each role in your organization.
dataDescription: Role identifiers and role naming metadata.
Role behavior flags used across product areas.
Content-visibility indicators such as show_in_content.
Deidentified for open data release with direct user identifiers removed.

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.description: Unique org unit identifier.

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: Unique role identifier.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the role. Field can be null.

fields.name: is_cascading
fields.description: Attribute indicating that the role cascades from other roles.

fields.name: in_class_list
fields.description: Attribute indicating that users with this role appear in class lists.

fields.name: class_list_role_name
fields.description: Attribute indicating the role name for users that appear in class lists. Field can be null.

fields.name: class_list_show_groups
fields.description: Attribute indicating that members of this role can see groups consisting of learners in the class list.

fields.name: class_list_show_sections
fields.description: Attribute indicating that members of this role can see sections consisting of learners in the class list.

fields.name: class_list_display_role
fields.description: Attribute indicating that members of this role appear in the class list with the role displayed.

fields.name: access_inactive_co
fields.description: Attribute indicating that the role can access inactive course offerings.

fields.name: has_special_access
fields.description: Attribute indicating that the role has special access to courses.

fields.name: add_to_course_offering_groups
fields.description: Attribute indicating that the role appears in the course offering group.

fields.name: can_be_auto_enrolled_into_groups
fields.description: Attribute indicating that the role can be automatically enrolled into groups in a class.

fields.name: add_to_course_offering_sections
fields.description: Attribute indicating that users with this role can be added to course offering sections.

fields.name: can_be_auto_enrolled_into_sections
fields.description: Attribute indicating that users with this role can be automatically enrolled into course sections.

fields.name: access_past_courses
fields.description: Attribute indicating that this role can access past courses.

fields.name: access_future_courses
fields.description: Attribute indicating that this role can access courses that have not yet started.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Indicates the sort order for users with this role.

fields.name: show_in_content
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in Content.

fields.name: show_in_discussion_assess
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in Discussions assessments.

fields.name: show_in_discussion_stats
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in Discussions statistics.

fields.name: show_in_grades
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in Grades.

fields.name: show_in_attendance
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in Attendance.

fields.name: allow_self_enroll_in_groups
fields.description: Indicates that this role should have permission to self-enroll in groups.

fields.name: show_in_registration
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in registration information for a course.

fields.name: show_in_user_progress
fields.description: Indicates that this role should appear in User Progress.

fields.name: role_alias
fields.description: Indicates the alias for this role. Field can be null.

fields.name: role_code
fields.description: Code assigned to each role for mapping to other systems or organizations. Field can be null.

fields.name: last_modified_date
fields.description: Date and time when the role was last modified (UTC). Field can be null.

droppedFields.name: deleted_by
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because it stores the user identifier of the person who deleted the role.

droppedFields.name: role_name
droppedFields.reason: Removed during deidentification because role names can contain personal identifiers.
